module.name: stamp
module.description: A decorated label — a "stamp" such as CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT or INTERNAL. The label is the block BODY (so spaces, commas and symbols are fine). Designed to drop inside a slide's @header / @footer block, but works in body text too. The default "double" style reproduces the classic double-bordered header badge.
module.aiSpec:
Use for a decorated status label / badge such as CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT, INTERNAL. The body is the label text (spaces, commas and symbols are fine; defaults to CONFIDENTIAL if empty). Block module but renders INLINE (a decorated span), so it sits within a header/footer or body text rather than as its own block. Often dropped inside a slide's @header / @footer.
Parameters: `variant` — double | solid | outline | plain (default double): the badge style. `color` — badge colour (default theme accent). `size` — sm | md | lg (default md): overall size. `uppercase` — true | false (default false): force the label to uppercase. `rotate` — tilt angle in degrees, -45 to 45 (default 0), for a classic angled stamp.
Example: <!-- @stamp variant: outline, color: #ef4444, rotate: -8, uppercase: true --> Draft <!-- @end -->

param.name: uppercase
param.label: Uppercase
param.desc: Force the label text to uppercase.

param.name: rotate
param.label: Rotate (deg)
param.desc: Tilt angle for a classic angled stamp.

snippet.label: Stamp (CONFIDENTIAL)
snippet.description: A double-bordered badge. variant: double | solid | outline | plain.

snippet.label: Header with stamp
snippet.description: A slide header containing a CONFIDENTIAL stamp. In the meta page it applies to all slides; in a slide it applies to that slide only.
